text.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing inputs, the filled report artefact, and the validator pass.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Architect runs `AWS Well-Architected Framework` on cadence — quarterly review window opens; one named owner, three input artefacts, two open risks from the prior cycle.

list.item: Named owner with role + escalation path.
Trigger event log (cron run or threshold breach).

section.title: Filled artefact (excerpt)
Validator trace
section.p: Running `python3 scripts/validate-aws-well-architected-framework.py --file out.json` exits 0; running with the bad example exits 1 and prints VIOLATION lines per missing required field.
